texto: Negative thoughts harm not only your physical self but also your spiritual one. They are like acid and leave behind tiredness and weariness. More the negative thoughts more listless and exhausted you’ll feel. So shut the door to negativity
autor: instead put yourself in God’s care
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a instead put yourself in God’s care: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a motivacao. O trecho “Negative thoughts harm not only your physical self but also your spiritual one. They are like aci…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, inspiracional, reflexao pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e reflexao.
